title: 2021 Virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: BSNC held its 2021 Virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Saturday, Oct 2. Shareholders voted on the election of five board directors who will serve three-year terms. Drawings were held for shareholders who cast a proxy. Checks will be mailed to winners within 10 business days. The Annual Meeting...

title: October is Cybersecurity Month
summary: Is your business prepared for a cyber attack? Hackers are clever and continue to come up with creative ways to threaten your data. Cyber attacks not only jeopardize your own personal data, but also the data of your customers. This can cost time, money and most of all customer trust. The Alaska SBDC...

title: New AK CASC Microberry Project Kicks Off
summary: The Microberry project may be a new initiative for the AK CASC, but the team are no newcomers to citizen science efforts. Christa Mulder and Katie Spellman have spent the past ten years working with youth groups and community members to better understand how earlier springs, warmer summers, and more variable falls across the state of Alaska affect the berries that so many of us enjoy.
